results.rendered_html:
vy-ave (-ava-√i) P. -avauti, to go or pass between, separate,  ŚBr. ;  Kauś. ;
(in gram.) to resolve or separate by inserting a vowel,  Prāt. ;
to dissolve, decompose,  MW.
